name: Tecno Camon 30 Pro
description: Tecno Camon 30 Pro features a 50MP front camera, Dimensity 7020 chip, and a stunning 6.78" AMOLED display with 144Hz refresh rate.

name: Tecno Camon 20
description: The Camon 20 brings a 64MP main camera, 6.67" FHD+ display, and a sleek design to the mid-range segment.

name: Tecno Pop 10
description: Entry-level powerhouse with a 6.6" HD+ display, 5000mAh battery, and Android 14 Go edition for smooth everyday performance.

name: Tecno Spark 20 Pro
description: Spark 20 Pro packs a 108MP camera, Helio G88 processor, and a 6.78" display with a 120Hz refresh rate.

name: Tecno Spark 20
description: Affordable and stylish, the Spark 20 comes with a 6.56" display, 50MP camera, and a 5000mAh battery.

name: Tecno Pova 6 Pro
description: Gaming-focused phone with a 6.78" AMOLED display, Dimensity 6080 chip, and a massive 6000mAh battery with 70W fast charging.

name: Tecno Megabook T1
description: Slim and powerful laptop with an Intel Core i5 processor, 15.6" FHD display, 16GB RAM, and all-day battery life.

name: Tecno Phantom X2
description: Flagship Tecno phone with a curved 6.8" AMOLED display, Dimensity 9000 chip, 50MP periscope camera, and premium build.
